allow: Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS table_count FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=''bdpt_db'';")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "SELECT id, username, full_name, role FROM users;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS migrated_letters FROM letters; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS migrated_attachments FROM attachments WHERE module_type != ''general'';")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "SELECT module_type, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM attachments GROUP BY module_type;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM workflow_attachments;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "RENAME TABLE workflow_attachments TO _old_workflow_attachments; RENAME TABLE workflow_stages TO _old_workflow_stages;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root bdpt_db -e "SELECT id FROM projects WHERE is_deleted=0 LIMIT 1;")
